proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have longer pfs_months (mean) than patients not receiving treatment_tamoxifen.
Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have longer pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_palbociclib.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have longer pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_trastuzumab.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have longer pfs_months than patients not receiving treatment_olaparib.
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have longer pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have longer pfs_months than patients not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 4.723 (treatment_tamoxifen=1, n=15035) vs 4.680 (treatment_tamoxifen=0, n=34965); diff=0.043, Welch t-test p=0.0769.
Mean pfs_months 5.408 (treatment_palbociclib=1, n=17428) vs 4.310 (treatment_palbociclib=0, n=32572); diff=1.098, Welch t-test p=0.
Mean pfs_months 4.645 (treatment_trastuzumab=1, n=10039) vs 4.705 (treatment_trastuzumab=0, n=39961); diff=-0.060, Welch t-test p=0.0292.
Mean pfs_months 4.660 (treatment_olaparib=1, n=4946) vs 4.696 (treatment_olaparib=0, n=45054); diff=-0.036, Welch t-test p=0.33.
Mean pfs_months 4.686 (treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=1, n=4987) vs 4.694 (treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=0, n=45013); diff=-0.007, Welch t-test p=0.846.
Mean pfs_months 4.630 (treatment_pembrolizumab=1, n=7585) vs 4.704 (treatment_pembrolizumab=0, n=42415); diff=-0.074, Welch t-test p=0.0175.

proposed_hypotheses.text: ER-positive patients (er_positive=1) have longer pfs_months than ER-negative patients.
PR-positive patients (pr_positive=1) have longer pfs_months than PR-negative patients.
HER2-positive patients (her2_positive=1) have shorter pfs_months than HER2-negative patients (worse natural history).
BRCA1-mutated patients (brca1_mutation=1) have shorter pfs_months than BRCA1 wild-type.
BRCA2-mutated patients (brca2_mutation=1) have different (likely shorter) pfs_months than BRCA2 wild-type.
PIK3CA-mutated patients have different pfs_months from wild-type.
TP53-mutated patients have shorter pfs_months than TP53 wild-type.
MSI-high patients have different pfs_months from MSI-low/stable patients.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 4.865 (er_positive=1, n=34886) vs 4.297 (er_positive=0, n=15114); diff=0.568, p=3.7e-143.
Mean pfs_months 4.824 (pr_positive=1, n=31954) vs 4.462 (pr_positive=0, n=18046); diff=0.362, p=5.82e-59.
Mean pfs_months 4.317 (her2_positive=1, n=9060) vs 4.776 (her2_positive=0, n=40940); diff=-0.459, p=6.1e-70.
Mean pfs_months 4.669 (brca1_mutation=1, n=1277) vs 4.694 (brca1_mutation=0, n=48723); diff=-0.024, p=0.724.
Mean pfs_months 4.569 (brca2_mutation=1, n=1222) vs 4.696 (brca2_mutation=0, n=48778); diff=-0.127, p=0.0813.
Mean pfs_months 4.328 (pik3ca_mutation=1, n=17365) vs 4.887 (pik3ca_mutation=0, n=32635); diff=-0.559, p=6.07e-144.
Mean pfs_months 4.697 (tp53_mutation=1, n=22479) vs 4.690 (tp53_mutation=0, n=27521); diff=0.007, p=0.762.
Mean pfs_months 4.725 (msi_high=1, n=498) vs 4.693 (msi_high=0, n=49502); diff=0.032, p=0.769.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv=1 have shorter pfs_months than stage_iv=0.
Patients with has_brain_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with liver_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with node_positive=1 have shorter pfs_months than node-negative.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 3.617 (stage_iv=1) vs 5.153 (stage_iv=0); diff=-1.536, p=0.
Mean pfs_months 3.750 (has_brain_mets=1) vs 4.800 (has_brain_mets=0); diff=-1.050, p=1.45e-178.
Mean pfs_months 4.708 (liver_mets=1) vs 4.690 (liver_mets=0); diff=0.018, p=0.555.
Mean pfs_months 4.723 (bone_mets=1) vs 4.685 (bone_mets=0); diff=0.038, p=0.17.
Mean pfs_months 4.681 (node_positive=1) vs 4.705 (node_positive=0); diff=-0.024, p=0.292.
OLS slope of pfs_months on ecog_ps: -1.180 per unit ECOG, p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope of pfs_months on age_years).
Female patients (sex_female=1) have different pfs_months from males in this breast-cancer cohort.
Postmenopausal patients (postmenopausal=1) have different pfs_months from premenopausal patients.
Higher bmi is associated with different pfs_months (slope test).

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope on age_years: 0.1759 per unit, p=0.
OLS slope on bmi: 0.0036 per unit, p=0.105.
Mean pfs_months 4.686 (sex_female=1) vs 4.699 (sex_female=0); diff=-0.013, p=0.562.
Mean pfs_months 4.684 (postmenopausal=1) vs 4.707 (postmenopausal=0); diff=-0.023, p=0.311.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Greater weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope on albumin_g_dl: 0.4988 per unit, p=9.39e-112.
OLS slope on ldh_u_l: -0.0005 per unit, p=0.000245.
OLS slope on nlr: 0.0033 per unit, p=0.537.
OLS slope on crp_mg_l: -0.0009 per unit, p=0.461.
OLS slope on weight_loss_pct_6mo: -0.0747 per unit, p=4.07e-148.
OLS slope on hemoglobin_g_dl: -0.0064 per unit, p=0.304.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit of treatment_tamoxifen is greater in er_positive=1 patients than in er_positive=0 patients (positive interaction tamoxifen x ER).
The pfs_months benefit of treatment_palbociclib is greater in er_positive=1 patients than in er_positive=0 (positive interaction palbociclib x ER).
The pfs_months benefit of treatment_trastuzumab is greater in her2_positive=1 patients than in her2_positive=0 (positive interaction trastuzumab x HER2).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_tamoxifen * er_positive', df).fit() and stratified means
analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_tamoxifen x er_positive: coef=-0.058, p=0.27. Stratified mean pfs: tx=1&bm=1:4.881, tx=1&bm=0:4.354, tx=0&bm=1:4.858, tx=0&bm=0:4.272. Within-bm tx effect: bm=1: 0.023, bm=0: 0.081.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib * er_positive', df).fit() and stratified means
analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_palbociclib x er_positive: coef=1.594, p=9.31e-229. Stratified mean pfs: tx=1&bm=1:5.890, tx=1&bm=0:4.285, tx=0&bm=1:4.313, tx=0&bm=0:4.303. Within-bm tx effect: bm=1: 1.577, bm=0: -0.017.

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_trastuzumab * her2_positive', df).fit() and stratified means
analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_trastuzumab x her2_positive: coef=-0.028, p=0.695. Stratified mean pfs: tx=1&bm=1:4.254, tx=1&bm=0:4.735, tx=0&bm=1:4.334, tx=0&bm=0:4.786. Within-bm tx effect: bm=1: -0.079, bm=0: -0.051.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit of treatment_olaparib is greater in patients with any BRCA mutation (brca1_mutation=1 or brca2_mutation=1) than in BRCA wild-type (positive interaction olaparib x BRCA).
The pfs_months benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab is greater in msi_high=1 patients than in msi_high=0 (positive interaction pembrolizumab x MSI-high).
The pfs_months benefit of treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan differs (likely greater) in her2_low=1 patients vs her2_low=0.
The pfs_months benefit of treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is greater in triple-negative patients (er_positive=0 & pr_positive=0 & her2_positive=0) than in non-triple-negative.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_olaparib x brca_any: coef=0.402, p=0.0208. Mean pfs tx=1&bm=1:4.933 (n=239); tx=1&bm=0:4.646; tx=0&bm=1:4.587; tx=0&bm=0:4.702. Within-bm tx effect: bm=1: 0.346, bm=0: -0.056.

Interaction treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high: coef=0.217, p=0.466. Mean pfs tx=1&bm=1:4.841 (n=86); tx=1&bm=0:4.628; tx=0&bm=1:4.701; tx=0&bm=0:4.704. Within-bm tx effect: bm=1: 0.141, bm=0: -0.077.

Interaction treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan x her2_low: coef=-0.038, p=0.626. Mean pfs tx=1&bm=1:4.737 (n=1833); tx=1&bm=0:4.657; tx=0&bm=1:4.768; tx=0&bm=0:4.650. Within-bm tx effect: bm=1: -0.031, bm=0: 0.007.

Interaction treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan x tnbc: coef=-0.105, p=0.246. Mean pfs tx=1&bm=1:4.228 (n=1084); tx=1&bm=0:4.813; tx=0&bm=1:4.314; tx=0&bm=0:4.794. Within-bm tx effect: bm=1: -0.085, bm=0: 0.019.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age, ECOG, stage_iv, brain/liver/bone metastases, ER, HER2, BRCA, and labs, treatment_palbociclib retains an independent positive association with pfs_months.
After adjusting for the same covariates, treatment_trastuzumab retains an independent positive association with pfs_months.
After adjusting for the same covariates, treatment_tamoxifen retains an independent positive association with pfs_months.
After adjusting for the same covariates, treatment_pembrolizumab does NOT have a significant positive main-effect coefficient on pfs_months (effect concentrated in MSI-high subgroup).

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for treatment_tamoxifen: -0.011 months (p=0.344); model adjusts for age, ECOG, stage, mets, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low/BRCA/MSI, albumin, LDH, NLR, CRP, weight loss, Hgb.
Adjusted coefficient for treatment_palbociclib: 1.101 months (p=0); model adjusts for age, ECOG, stage, mets, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low/BRCA/MSI, albumin, LDH, NLR, CRP, weight loss, Hgb.
Adjusted coefficient for treatment_trastuzumab: -0.010 months (p=0.443); model adjusts for age, ECOG, stage, mets, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low/BRCA/MSI, albumin, LDH, NLR, CRP, weight loss, Hgb.
Adjusted coefficient for treatment_pembrolizumab: -0.024 months (p=0.0999); model adjusts for age, ECOG, stage, mets, ER/PR/HER2/HER2-low/BRCA/MSI, albumin, LDH, NLR, CRP, weight loss, Hgb.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories (white, black, hispanic, asian, other).
Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories (private, medicare, medicaid, uninsured).
Patients with rural_residence=1 have shorter pfs_months than non-rural patients.
More years of education_years are associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: One-way ANOVA pfs_months by race_ethnicity: F=0.849, p=0.494. Group means: white=4.679(n=32498), black=4.717(n=5889), hispanic=4.707(n=7631), asian=4.735(n=2970), other=4.762(n=1012).
One-way ANOVA pfs_months by insurance_type: F=0.310, p=0.818. Means: private=4.685(n=20090), medicare=4.692(n=20953), medicaid=4.706(n=6911), uninsured=4.733(n=2046).
OLS slope on education_years: -0.0032 months per year, p=0.388.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with diabetes_mellitus=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with hypertension=1 have different pfs_months from those without.
Patients with chronic_kidney_disease=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with heart_failure=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Patients with prior_malignancy=1 have different pfs_months from those without.

analyses.result_summary: pfs chronic_kidney_disease=1: 4.707 (n=6060) vs 0: 4.691 (n=43940); diff=0.016, p=0.642.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with prior_chemotherapy=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Greater years_since_diagnosis is associated with different pfs_months.
Patients with prior_targeted_therapy=1 have shorter pfs_months than those without.

analyses.result_summary: pfs prior_targeted_therapy=1: 4.698 (n=5835) vs 0: 4.692 (n=44165); diff=0.006, p=0.866.
OLS slope on prior_lines_of_therapy: 0.0093 months per unit, p=0.343.
OLS slope on years_since_diagnosis: -0.0032 months per unit, p=0.63.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope on fatigue_grade: 0.0005 months per unit, p=0.963.
OLS slope on pain_nrs: -0.0015 months per unit, p=0.72.
OLS slope on dyspnea_grade: 0.0104 months per unit, p=0.299.
OLS slope on appetite_loss_grade: -0.0018 months per unit, p=0.861.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ca_125_u_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher ki67_pct is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Larger tumor_size_cm is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope on ca_125_u_ml: 0.000628 months per unit, p=0.0637.
OLS slope on cea_ng_ml: 0.000269 months per unit, p=0.822.
OLS slope on alkaline_phosphatase_u_l: -0.000671 months per unit, p=0.00295.
OLS slope on ki67_pct: -0.018764 months per unit, p=2.98e-93.
OLS slope on tumor_size_cm: 0.000552 months per unit, p=0.931.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within er_positive=1 patients only, treatment_tamoxifen is associated with longer pfs_months than no tamoxifen.
Within er_positive=0 patients only, treatment_tamoxifen has no benefit (or is inferior) on pfs_months.
Within her2_positive=1, treatment_trastuzumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within her2_positive=0, treatment_trastuzumab has no benefit on pfs_months.
Within brca_any=1, treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within msi_high=1, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by treatment_tamoxifen within er_positive==1
analyses.result_summary: In er_positive=1 stratum (n=34886): pfs treatment_tamoxifen=1: 4.881(n=10535) vs treatment_tamoxifen=0: 4.858(n=24351); diff=0.023, p=0.45.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by treatment_tamoxifen within er_positive==0
analyses.result_summary: In er_positive=0 stratum (n=15114): pfs treatment_tamoxifen=1: 4.354(n=4500) vs treatment_tamoxifen=0: 4.272(n=10614); diff=0.081, p=0.03.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by treatment_trastuzumab within her2_positive==1
analyses.result_summary: In her2_positive=1 stratum (n=9060): pfs treatment_trastuzumab=1: 4.254(n=1890) vs treatment_trastuzumab=0: 4.334(n=7170); diff=-0.079, p=0.153.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by treatment_trastuzumab within her2_positive==0
analyses.result_summary: In her2_positive=0 stratum (n=40940): pfs treatment_trastuzumab=1: 4.735(n=8149) vs treatment_trastuzumab=0: 4.786(n=32791); diff=-0.051, p=0.104.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by treatment_olaparib within brca_any==1
analyses.result_summary: In brca_any=1 stratum (n=2499): pfs treatment_olaparib=1: 4.933(n=239) vs treatment_olaparib=0: 4.587(n=2260); diff=0.346, p=0.0414.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by treatment_pembrolizumab within msi_high==1
analyses.result_summary: In msi_high=1 stratum (n=498): pfs treatment_pembrolizumab=1: 4.841(n=86) vs treatment_pembrolizumab=0: 4.701(n=412); diff=0.141, p=0.637.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Carriers of snp_rs429358 (APOE epsilon-4 marker) have different pfs_months from non-carriers.
snp_rs1801133 (MTHFR C677T) genotype is associated with pfs_months (slope test).
snp_rs1045642 (MDR1/ABCB1) genotype is associated with pfs_months.
snp_rs1065852 (CYP2D6*10) genotype is associated with pfs_months overall.
snp_rs4244285 (CYP2C19*2) genotype is associated with pfs_months overall.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope on snp_rs429358: -0.0338, p=0.28.
OLS slope on snp_rs1801133: 0.0284, p=0.243.
OLS slope on snp_rs1045642: -0.0289, p=0.198.
OLS slope on snp_rs1065852: 0.0335, p=0.33.
OLS slope on snp_rs4244285: -0.0173, p=0.52.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The pfs_months benefit of treatment_tamoxifen is smaller in patients carrying snp_rs1065852 (CYP2D6*10 variant, reduced metabolism) than in non-carriers (negative interaction tamoxifen x snp_rs1065852).
The negative interaction tamoxifen x snp_rs1065852 is present specifically among er_positive=1 patients.

analyses.result_summary: Within er_positive=1 (n=34886): interaction tamoxifen x snp_rs1065852 coef=0.026, p=0.785. Tamoxifen effect by carrier status: snp=1: 0.046, snp=0: 0.020.

proposed_hypotheses.text: her2_amplification=1 patients have different pfs_months from her2_amplification=0 patients.
her2_amplification=1 is largely concordant with her2_positive=1 (chi-square test of independence is highly significant).
Within her2_amplification=1, treatment_trastuzumab improves pfs_months relative to no trastuzumab.

analyses.result_summary: Crosstab her2_positive x her2_amplification: [[39748, 1192], [8785, 275]] (rows=her2_positive 0/1, cols=her2_amp 0/1). Chi2=0.36, p=0.55. Diff in P(her2_amp=1 | her2_positive): 0.001.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by trastuzumab within her2_amplification==1
analyses.result_summary: Within her2_amplification=1 (n=1467): pfs tras=1: 4.733(n=302) vs tras=0: 4.756(n=1165); diff=-0.023, p=0.892.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a full multivariable OLS model with all six treatments and key biomarker interactions (tamoxifen x er_positive, palbociclib x er_positive, trastuzumab x her2_positive, olaparib x brca_any, pembrolizumab x msi_high, sacituzumab x her2_low), the predictive interactions remain statistically significant after adjustment for demographics, comorbidities, and labs.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction effects: treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive: coef=0.002, p=0.934; treatment_palbociclib:er_positive: coef=1.570, p=0; treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive: coef=0.012, p=0.712; treatment_olaparib:brca_any: coef=-0.000, p=0.998; treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high: coef=0.151, p=0.258; treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:her2_low: coef=0.045, p=0.195. Model R^2=0.799, n=50000.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within postmenopausal=1 patients, treatment_tamoxifen is associated with longer pfs_months than no tamoxifen.
Within postmenopausal=1 & er_positive=1 patients, treatment_palbociclib is associated with longer pfs_months than no palbociclib.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by tamoxifen in postmenopausal==1
t-test pfs by palbociclib in postmenopausal==1 & er_positive==1

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable adjustment, has_brain_mets=1 is associated with shorter pfs_months than has_brain_mets=0 (negative coefficient).
The pembrolizumab pfs effect differs by has_brain_mets status (interaction pembrolizumab x has_brain_mets is non-zero).
The trastuzumab pfs effect differs by has_brain_mets status (interaction trastuzumab x has_brain_mets is non-zero).

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for has_brain_mets in main MV model: -0.984 months (p=0).
Interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:has_brain_mets: coef=-0.051, p=0.615.
Interaction treatment_trastuzumab:has_brain_mets: coef=0.079, p=0.384.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Triple-negative (er_positive=0, pr_positive=0, her2_positive=0) patients have shorter pfs_months than non-TNBC.
Within TNBC patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.
Within TNBC patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is associated with longer pfs_months than no sacituzumab.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by treatment_pembrolizumab within tnbc==1
analyses.result_summary: In tnbc=1 (n=10496): pfs treatment_pembrolizumab=1: 4.366(n=1578) vs treatment_pembrolizumab=0: 4.294(n=8918); diff=0.072, p=0.222.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan within tnbc==1
analyses.result_summary: In tnbc=1 (n=10496): pfs treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=1: 4.228(n=1084) vs treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan=0: 4.314(n=9412); diff=-0.085, p=0.217.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within brca1_mutation=1 patients, treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within brca2_mutation=1 patients, treatment_olaparib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Within brca_any=0 (no germline BRCA), treatment_olaparib has no benefit on pfs_months.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by olaparib within brca1_mutation==1
t-test pfs by olaparib within brca2_mutation==1
t-test pfs by olaparib within brca_any==0

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within her2_low=1 patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan is associated with longer pfs_months than no sacituzumab.
Within her2_positive=0 & her2_low=0 (HER2-zero) patients, treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan effect on pfs_months differs from the her2_low subgroup.
Within er_positive=1 & postmenopausal=0 (premenopausal ER+) patients, treatment_palbociclib is associated with longer pfs_months than no palbociclib.

analyses.code: t-test pfs by sacituzumab in her2_low==1
t-test pfs by sacituzumab in HER2-zero (her2_positive==0 & her2_low==0)
t-test pfs by palbociclib in er_positive==1 & postmenopausal==0

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for age, ECOG, stage, mets, and labs, the treatment_palbociclib x er_positive interaction on pfs_months remains positive and significant.
After adjusting for the same covariates, the treatment_olaparib x brca_any interaction remains positive and significant.
After adjusting for the same covariates, the treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high interaction remains positive and significant.
After adjusting for the same covariates, the treatment_trastuzumab x her2_positive interaction remains positive and significant.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction treatment_palbociclib x er_positive: coef=1.575, p=0.
Adjusted interaction treatment_olaparib x brca_any: coef=0.061, p=0.508.
Adjusted interaction treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high: coef=0.221, p=0.161.
Adjusted interaction treatment_trastuzumab x her2_positive: coef=0.015, p=0.696.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A comprehensive multivariable model with treatments, biomarkers, predictive interactions, and prognostic factors explains a meaningful fraction of variance in pfs_months (R-squared > 0.10) and the overall F-test is highly significant.

Among non-treatment factors in the full model, ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, has_brain_mets, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and ki67_pct are among the strongest independent predictors of pfs_months (smallest p-values).
